'''Dohu VII''' was the seventh of eight [[Planet/Legends|planets]] in the [[Dohu system/Legends|Dohu system]]. It was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Mineral/Legends|mineral]]-based [[Species/Legends|species]] called the [[Silika]].<ref name="CSWE" /> [[Linkaas Corporation]] had a warehouse near [[Docking Bay 71]] in [[Skagras]].<ref name="BF" />

{{Planet-stub}}
